ui.settings.title: ⚙️ Settings
ui.summary.title: Amazing session, {name}!
ui.tutorial.step1_body: Tap any card to start learning 🎮
ui.tutorial.step2_body: Each correct answer gives stars. Unlock stickers and medals!
ui.cookie.text: We use Google Analytics to improve the app. Do you accept analytics cookies?
ui.parents.title: 👨‍👩‍👧 Parents Zone
ui.parents.subtitle: Track progress and configure the app
ui.parents.no_profiles: No profiles yet. Go to the home screen to create one.
ui.parents.content_desc: PinguPlay has 38 educational games with 15 difficulty levels each. Difficulty increases automatically as your child progresses:
ui.parents.adaptive_desc: Each game has 15 levels. Completing a level unlocks the next. If your child fails 3 times in a row, the game drops one level to avoid frustration.
ui.parents.stars_desc: ⭐ Stars unlock collectible stickers (20 achievements from 5⭐ to 2000⭐).
ui.parents.pin_desc: The PIN protects this area so only adults can access settings and stats.
ui.parents.pin_no_pin: No PIN set. Anyone can access this area.
ui.parents.data_desc: Game progress is saved locally on this device.
ui.parents.privacy_no_ads: ✅ No ads — No advertising inside the app
ui.parents.privacy_analytics: ✅ Consensual analytics — Only if parent accepts cookies
ui.parents.privacy_local: ✅ Local progress — All game activity saved on device only
ui.parents.privacy_free: ✅ Free forever — All content is free
ui.parents.privacy_no_links: ✅ No external links — Children can't leave the app
ui.parents.support_desc: PinguPlay is free and ad-free. If you like it, you can help keep it going:
ui.parents.kofi_btn: ☕ Buy me a coffee on Ko-Fi
ui.parents.contact_prompt: Suggestions or issues? Write to us:
